reply: (1) This device is an AutomationDirect GS10 Variable Frequency Drive, used to control the speed of AC motors. (2) The loud grinding noise and high vibration amplitude suggest a motor might be damaged or misaligned. (3) The tech should check the motor for any grinding noise and ensure it is properly aligned. For an unknown fault, the tech should start by checking the motor and VFD connections, and then monitor the motor's temperature and sound.
